subject: refactor(theme): begin Tailwind utility migration in App.tsx
body:
Convert App.tsx shell classes to Tailwind utilities: app container,
loading state, header layout, title, alpha badge, toolbar, update
banner, empty state, large graph warning. CSS rules retained as
comments for now — full deletion deferred until all consumers migrated.
